## Summary

Describe the user-visible problem and the chosen solution.

## Validation

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `npm run validate` passes locally
- [ ] Documentation updated when behavior or public types changed
- [ ] Changelog updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] No new runtime dependency, or the supply-chain tradeoff is explained

## Compatibility and risk

List affected Playwright/Node.js versions, breaking changes, security considerations, and rollback options.
